## Thank You!
Firstly, thank you so much for wanting to contribute to this silly project! It makes this project much funner (and sillier) :)

## Found an Issue?
- Feel free to open an issue in the issue tracker
- Ensure there isn't already one :)

## Want to add new language?
- Make sure to edit the `Readme` to include the new language.
  - The readme should be structured the way other languages are. 
-  Someone will (hopefully) review and merge your PR!

## Want to improve an existing implementation?
- Edit the `Readme` accordingly if needed.
- Wait for a reviewer and in particular the person who created the file.
- And finally (and hopefully), merged!
